expected.notes: Student has health coverage in only one state; has_multistate_health=no prevents rule from firing despite being on student track.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'student_multistate_health', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.has_multistate_health eq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
